query: SELECT id, nome, status, progresso, itensProcessados, totalItens, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, updatedAt, NOW()) as minutos_desde_update, createdAt, updatedAt FROM arquivos WHERE status = 'processando' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5
